**Test Plan**  
**Online Job Fair Registration**    
**Skill Issue (Group 17\)**

Presented By

| Chonnakarn Wongnim | 6833036021 | Test Leader, Playwright |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Piriyakorn Suphakitcharoen | 6833200621 | Document |

2110423 Software Engineering   
29 April 2026   
Department of Computer Engineering Faculty of Engineering,   
Chulalongkorn University   
**User Story:1-1  User create Review**

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Rating” is selected 1-5 star | Valid |
| 2 | “Rating” isn’t selected | Invalid |
| 3 | “Comment” is string | Valid |
| 4 | “Comment” is empty | Invalid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. A user logged in as a valid user  
2. A user is on the Company Profile page.

| Test Case ID | TC1-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Rating | 5 star |
|  | Comment | “Good company” |
| Expected output | ![][image1] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 1,3 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC1-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Rating | No select |
|  | Comment | “Good company” |
| Expected output | ![][image2] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 2 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC1-3 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Rating | 3 star |
|  | Comment | Empty |
| Expected output | ![][image3] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 4 |  |

**User Story:1-2 User see other user Reviews**

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. Any user (logged-in or guest) is on the Company Profile Page.

| Test Case ID | TC2-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | ----- |
| Precondition | The company already has existing published reviews from other users.  |  |
| Inputs | \- |  |
| Expected output | ![][image4]  |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

| Test Case ID | TC2-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | ----- |
| Precondition | The company has zero review |  |
| Inputs | \- |  |
| Expected output | ![][image5] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

**User Story:1-3 User edit their Review**

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Comment” is string | Valid |
| 2 | “Comment” is empty | Invalid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. A user logged in as a valid user  
2. A user is on Edit Review Page of their submitted review

| Test Case ID | TC3-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Comment | “Interesting Company” |
| Expected output | ![][image6]![][image7] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 1 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC3-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Comment | Empty |
| Expected output | ![][image8] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 2 |  |

**US1-4: User delete their Review**

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. A user logged in as a valid user  
2. A user is on the Company Profile Page viewing their own review

| Test Case ID | TC4-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | ----- |
| Precondition | \- |  |
| Inputs | User click the "Delete" button and click "Confirm" in the prompt. |  |
| Expected output | ![][image9]  |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

| Test Case ID | TC4-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | ----- |
| Precondition | User has clicked the "Delete" button on their review. |  |
| Inputs | User click the “Cancel” button. |  |
| Expected output | ![][image10]  |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

**US1-5: Admin see any users Reviews**

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Search bar input” is empty | Valid |
| 2 | “Search bar input” is string that with matching record | Valid |
| 3 | “Search bar input” is string that with no matching record | Valid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. An admin is logged into the Admin Dashboard  
2. An admin is on the Review Monitor Page

| Test Case ID | TC5-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Status filter | All Status |
|  | Date filter | Newest First |
|  | Company filter | Empty |
|  | Search bar input | Empty |
| Expected output | ![][image11] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 1 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC5-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Status filter | All Status |
|  | Date filter | Newest First |
|  | Company filter | Empty |
|  | Search bar input | “ads” |
| Expected output | ![][image12] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 2 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC5-3 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Status filter | All Status |
|  | Date filter | Newest First |
|  | Company filter | Empty |
|  | Search bar input | “nowhere” |
| Expected output | ![][image13] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 3 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC5-4 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Precondition | A Company has zero reviews. |  |
| Inputs | Status filter | All Status |
|  | Date filter | Newest First |
|  | Company filter | “Outer Space” |
|  | Search bar input | Empty |
| Expected output | ![][image14] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

**US1-6: Admin delete any users Review**

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Violate Reason” is selected | Valid |
| 2 | “Violate Reason” isn’t selected | Invalid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. An admin is logged into the Admin Dashboard  
2. An admin is on the Reviews Monitor Page viewing a specific review

| Test Case ID | TC6-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Violate Reason | Spam |
| Expected output |  ![][image15] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 1 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC6-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Violate Reason | No select |
| Expected output | ![][image16] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 2 |  |

**US2-1: User create Blog** 

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Title” is string | Valid |
| 2 | “Title” is empty | Invalid |
| 3 | “Context” is string | Valid |
| 4 | “Context” is empty | Invalid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. A user logged in as a valid user  
2. A user is on the Blog Creation Page

| Test Case ID | TC7-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | title | “How to edit my booking” |
|  | context | “Help me please” |
| Expected output | ![][image17] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 1, 3 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC7-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | title | Empty |
|  | context | “I love you” |
| Expected output | the publish button should be disabled![][image18] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 2 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC7-3 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | title | “How to delete my booking” |
|  | context | Empty |
| Expected output | the publish button should be disabled![][image19] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 4 |  |

**US2-2: User create Comment**

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Comment” is string | Valid |
| 2 | “Comment” is empty | Invalid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. A user logged in as a valid user  
2. A user is on the Blog Details Page drafting a comment

| Test Case ID | TC8-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | comment | “I think so.” |
| Expected output | ![][image20] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 1 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC8-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | comment | Empty |
| Expected output | ![][image21] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 2 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC8-3 |  |
| :---- | :---- | ----- |
| Precondition | User’s comment text has 100 characters. |  |
| Inputs | User try to type more characters to their comment. |  |
| Expected output | ![][image22] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Search bar input” is empty | Valid |
| 2 | “Search bar input” is string that with matching record | Valid |

1. A user logged in as a valid user  
2. A user is on the Blog Feed Page

| Test Case ID | TC9-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Search bar input | empty |
| Expected output | ![][image23] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |

| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Search bar input | “Hello” |
| Expected output | ![][image24] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |

| Inputs | Search bar input | “Handsome” |
| Expected output | ![][image25] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 3 |  |

**Test Cases:**

| :---- | :---- | ----- |

**US2-5: User edit blogs**

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Title” is string | Valid |
| 2 | “Title” is empty | Invalid |
| 3 | “Context” is string | Valid |
| 4 | “Context” is empty | Invalid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. A user logged in as a valid user  
2. A user is on the Blog Edit Page of their own post

| Test Case ID | TC11-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Title | “Test blog 1.5” |
|  | Content | “tb1.5” |
| Expected output | ![][image28] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 1, 3 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC11-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Title | empty |
|  | Context | “I think Mars has many resources” |
| Expected output | ![][image29] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 2 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC11-3 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Title | “Outer Space” |
|  | Context | empty |
| Expected output | ![][image30] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 4 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC11-4 |  |
| :---- | :---- | ----- |
| Precondition | User made changes to their blog. |  |
| Inputs | User attempt to navigate away or close the tab without saving. |  |
| Expected output | ![][image31] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

**US2-11: Admin delete any users Blog**

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Violate Reason” is selected | Valid |
| 2 | “Violate Reason” isn’t selected | Invalid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. An admin is logged into the Admin Dashboard  
2. An admin is on the Blogs Monitor Page reviewing a specific blog

| Test Case ID | TC17-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Violate Reason | Harassment |
| Expected output | ![][image46] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 1 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC17-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Violate Reason | No Select |
| Expected output | ![][image47] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | 2 |  |

| Test Case ID | TC17-3 |  |
| :---- | :---- | ----- |
| Precondition | Blog has been deleted by an administrator. |  |
| Inputs | User or Admin attempts to directly access its specific Blog Post URL. |  |
| Expected output | ![][image48] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

**US2-12: Admin delete any users Comment**

**Input Equivalence Classes**

| Equivalence Classes ID | Input | Validation |
| :---: | ----- | :---: |
| 1 | “Violate Reason” is selected | Valid |
| 2 | “Violate Reason” isn’t selected | Invalid |

**Test Cases:**  
Precondition

1. An admin is logged into the Admin Dashboard  
2. An admin is on the Comments Monitor Page or Blog Post Details Page

| Test Case ID | TC18-1 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Violate Reason | Offensive Content |
| Expected output | ![][image49] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

| Test Case ID | TC18-2 |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Inputs | Violate Reason | No Select |
| Expected output | ![][image50] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |

| Test Case ID | TC18-3 |  |
| :---- | :---- | ----- |
| Precondition | Admin has confirmed to delete Comment. |  |
| Inputs | Admin clicks the Cancel button within 5 seconds. |  |
| Expected output | ![][image51] |  |
| Actual output | Same as Expected Output  |  |
| Class coverage | \- |  |
